name: Beruchero
description:
**Gender**: Female
**Race**: Human

Belchero is the director of the Belchero Orphanage. She imposed strict rules within the Academy and the orphanage.

Belchero has black hair with white strains in it, which ends in a topknot, and two long curls down each ear. She has a gaunt face and sharp eyes with a monocle on her right eye. She wears a black robe with black clothes beneath and black gloves.

Belchero is very strict and enforces her rules strongly, but also only has the best interest of the orphans in mind.

Belchero was once an active Delver but retired due to knee injuries. Belchero, together with Jiruo, teaches the orphans about the Abyss and other academic subjects.

(Source: Made in Abyss Wiki, edited)
